# braintrustdata_functions (Data Source)

Lists Braintrust functions using API-native filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List functions filtered by project + name.
data "braintrustdata_functions" "by_name" {
  project_id = "project-abc123"
  name       = "my-tool"
  limit      = 10
}

# List functions filtered by project + slug.
data "braintrustdata_functions" "by_slug" {
  project_id = "project-abc123"
  slug       = "my-tool"
  limit      = 10
}

# List functions using cursor-based pagination.
data "braintrustdata_functions" "paged" {
  starting_after = "function-abc123"
  limit          = 10
}

output "function_lists" {
  value = {
    by_name_ids = data.braintrustdata_functions.by_name.ids
    by_slug_ids = data.braintrustdata_functions.by_slug.ids
    paged_ids    = data.braintrustdata_functions.paged.ids
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ending_before` (String) Optional pagination cursor to fetch functions before this ID.
- `limit` (Number) Optional max number of functions to return. Supports `0`.
- `name` (String) Optional exact function name filter. Maps to API query parameter `function_name`.
- `project_id` (String) Optional project ID filter.
- `slug` (String) Optional exact function slug filter.
- `starting_after` (String) Optional pagination cursor to fetch functions after this ID.

### Read-Only

- `functions` (Attributes List) List of functions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--functions))
- `ids` (List of String) List of returned function IDs.

<a id="nestedatt--functions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `functions`

Read-Only:

- `xact_id` (String) The transactional ID associated with the function.
- `created` (String) The timestamp when the function was created.
- `description` (String) A description of the function.
- `function_data` (String) The function data as a JSON-encoded string.
- `function_schema` (String) The function schema as a JSON-encoded string.
- `function_type` (String) The function type.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the function.
- `log_id` (String) The log ID associated with the function.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata associated with the function as key-value pairs.
- `name` (String) The name of the function.
- `org_id` (String) The ID of the organization the function belongs to.
- `origin` (String) The function origin as a JSON-encoded string.
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project the function belongs to.
- `prompt_data` (String) The prompt data as a JSON-encoded string.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the function.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the function.
